title: Dulux Easycare Washable and Tough Matt Emulsion Paint For Walls And Ceilings - Almond White 2.5 Litres
features: Stain repellent technology repels liquid stains
20 x tougher than standard Dulux Matt
description: From the manufacturer Be Inspired Tranquil Dawn is a pale green with grey tones. This versatile shade is our Colour of the Year 2020. It creates an uplifting, natural beauty in your space. Polished Pebble is a light, silvery grey. It works particularly well with warm yellow or pink pastels for a fresh, sunny effect. Choose this shade if you’d like to create a bright, neutral space which suits any period of home. Dusted Fondant is a heathery, mid-tone. It creates a sanctuary away from the stresses and strains of busy life. It transforms your room into a mellow, thoughtful space, where you can relax and unwind. White Mist is an ultra-pale grey with a smoke-like quality. It combines well with other cool neutrals, either on the ceiling or to create a light, open space. Choose this colour if you’re looking for a cool, natural white.
